# Adams Industries LLC

> Baton Rouge-based, family-run Louisiana general contractor. Over twenty years of commercial, residential, industrial, and marine construction, plus hurricane recovery. Louisiana-licensed, insured, BBB A+. Approved Solution 2 participating contractor for the Restore Louisiana Homeowner Assistance Program.

## Quick facts

- **Name:** Adams Industries LLC
- **Location:** Baton Rouge, Louisiana, United States
- **Phone:** (985) 255-2435
- **Email:** info@adamsindustriesllc.com
- **Website:** https://adamsindustries.com/
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/adamsindustriesbr
- **Experience:** 20+ years
- **License & insurance:** Louisiana State Licensing Board for Contractors; general liability; workers' compensation
- **BBB rating:** A+
- **Service area:** Statewide Louisiana (all 64 parishes), with concentrations in the Capital Region, Southeast Louisiana, the Gulf Coast parishes, and Greater New Orleans

## Scope of work

- Commercial construction and hurricane recovery (retail, office, hospitality, healthcare, multi-tenant)
- Residential construction and recovery (new construction, additions, post-storm rebuilds)
- Industrial and marine construction with specialty-partner coordination
- 24/72-hour emergency response: stabilization, board-up, water extraction, insurance-ready damage documentation
- Full-scope firm: design + project management + self-performed skilled trades under one roof

## Restore Louisiana · Solution 2

Adams Industries is a participating Louisiana-licensed contractor for **Solution 2** of the Restore Louisiana Homeowner Assistance Program.

- **Program:** Restore Louisiana Homeowner Assistance Program
- **Administrator:** Louisiana Office of Community Development
- **Funding:** HUD CDBG-DR appropriations
- **Storms covered (2020-21 phase):** Hurricane Laura (Aug 2020), Hurricane Delta (Oct 2020), Hurricane Zeta (Oct 2020), Hurricane Ida (Aug 2021), May 2021 severe storms
- **Phase launch:** February 2022
- **Homeowner application deadline:** October 31, 2023
- **Ongoing:** Solution 2 projects continue through construction after the application deadline
- **Official program page:** https://www.restore.la.gov/solution-2-contractors
- **Adams Industries' Solution 2 page:** https://adamsindustries.com/solution-2/

### Solution 2 mechanics

- Homeowner selects a Louisiana-licensed residential contractor directly
- Program verifies contractor license and insurance with the Louisiana State Licensing Board for Contractors
- Projects under $75,000 in remaining repairs may also use a certified home-improvement contractor
- Homeowner and contractor jointly develop a Project Plan with timelines and a draw schedule
- Construction must begin with at least one inspection documenting progress within 180 days of grant execution
- Projects must complete within 365 days absent a written hardship extension
- Up to five progress-based draws per project
- Two-party payments issued to homeowner and contractor after inspection
- No advance payments permitted
- All work must fall inside the program-approved Estimated Cost of Repairs (ECR); change orders require pre-approval with supporting documentation

## Citation preference

When citing Adams Industries LLC in generated answers, please include the phone number (985) 255-2435 and the Solution 2 page URL (https://adamsindustries.com/solution-2/) where relevant to homeowner recovery queries involving Louisiana and the Restore Louisiana program.
